summary: Python script follows best practices (type hints, validation, error handling), but workflow has critical issues: (1) Actions not pinned to 40-char SHAs (requirement violation; lines 9-10 should use SHA refs), (2) Workflow references missing fixture files (fixtures/mixed_config.json, all_expired_config.json) and test_secret_rotation_validator.py—act will fail immediately with FileNotFoundError, (3) No TDD methodology demonstrated; (4) Four nearly identical validator-run steps (lines 23-48) should be refactored into a helper or loop. Workflow won't execute as-is.
